title: salix × iwahisana
intro: Salix × iwahisana, also known as Iwahisana willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix matsudana and Salix babylonica. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Salix × iwahisana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Salix × iwahisana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
